pi_items.source: setup_task.sh creates students with grade_level_id=9 for targets; export_result.sh searches Downloads for PDF; verifier.py checks PDF content for target students of Grade 9

setup_task.sh lines 49-52 create students with first_name='Freshman' and last_name='One'/'Two'/'Three' (student_ids 2001, 2002, 2003); verifier.py lines 101-105 checks for these exact strings in PDF text_content
setup_task.sh lines 56-57 create Grade 10 student with first_name='Senior' and last_name='Student' (student_id 3001); verifier.py lines 114-118 confirms this student should NOT appear in PDF
setup_task.sh lines 21-22 ensure this directory exists; export_result.sh line 5 defines DOWNLOAD_DIR variable; export_result.sh line 12 searches for PDFs in this directory
export_result.sh line 12 searches for 'find "$DOWNLOAD_DIR" -name "*.pdf"'; verifier.py lines 87-97 uses pdfminer to extract text from PDF

privileged_info_summary: The task batch_generate_schedules requires generating a PDF report from an OpenSIS student information system filtered to include only Grade 9 students. The target students are named 'Freshman One', 'Freshman Two', and 'Freshman Three' (all Grade 9). The excluded student is 'Senior Student' (Grade 10). The generated PDF file is expected to be saved to /home/ga/Downloads with a .pdf extension. Login credentials for OpenSIS are admin/Admin@123. All test data is synthetically generated by database setup scripts for task automation purposes.
